# Parchment Notice

TerpVault bundles the single-file Parchment web build **2025.1.14** as:

```text
assets/vendor/parchment/index.html
```

The file was provided as `parchment-single-file-2025-01-14.zip` with a single `parchment.html` file and was renamed to `index.html` for plugin use.

The bundled HTML includes its own embedded bundled-license comment near the end of the file. Keep that comment intact when updating the vendor build.

Parchment and its bundled upstream interpreters/assets may carry multiple licenses. Do not remove this notice or `docs/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md` from redistributed plugin packages.
